data.title: Yuzuki-san Chi no Yonkyoudai.
data.synopsis:
The Yuzuki family, which consists of four brothers, lost their parents two years ago. Hayato, the eldest son, is a hard worker and the pillar of the family. Mikoto, the second son, is calm and collected, but he has a soft spot for his younger brother Minato, whom he adores and thinks is cute. Minato, the third son, is energetic and adores his brothers, but he is clumsy and awkward. Gakuto, the fourth son, is a studious and mature first-grader who is often referred to as a "wise man." The manga depicts the four brothers' daily lives as they navigate their family, school, and community.

(Source: MAL News)

種付おじさんとNTR人妻セックス The Animation

data.title: Tanetsuke Ojisan to NTR Hitozuma Sex The Animation
data.title_japanese: 種付おじさんとNTR人妻セックス The Animation
data.synopsis: One night, Kasumi accidentally witnesses intimacy between her husband and daughter. This comes as a shock to a woman who is accustomed to valuing family values ​​and home. Trying to save her family and pretending that she didn’t see anything, every day she feels more and more superfluous and unnecessary. A neighbor intervenes in the situation, who has long had his eye on Kasumi’s body. He intends to show her stupid husband that married women are always in demand.
